verification: python3 -m unittest = 60/60 OK; python3 bench/effort.py selftest = ALL INVARIANTS HELD (exit 0); validate_oracles.py still 34/34; Wilson (0/10,5/10,10/10) and Newcombe method-10 (56/70 vs 48/80 -> 0.0524,0.3339) match published values; sample RESULTS.md renders ceiling column, H1/H2/H3 scorecard, three-baseline Pareto headline, no emoji; .gitignore verified (calibration.json tracked; state/capture, state/dispatch-log.jsonl, raw ignored); no worktree pollution (tempdirs).
notes: REVISED per team-lead spec update (merged main dd0ef19; B1 scaffold now present). Single-file stdlib-only harness (Python 3.14), 7 subcommands. Deltas implemented: (1) results.jsonl fields bound verbatim to the R1 envelope (effort_requested/effort_effective/effort_effective_source/fidelity_ok, input_tokens/output_tokens/total_tokens, cache_*_input_tokens, total_cost_usd, model_usage); (2) Phase 0.6 effort-fidelity gate in validate -- installs a Stop-hook capture (--settings file + sidecar), joins effective effort by session_id, aborts unless requested==effective for all 5 tiers; run now records effective effort per cell, discards+retries fidelity mismatches (bounded), excludes unverified/mismatched runs from cells; run is hard-gated on Phase 0 (--force override); (3) analyze: NI reference is the empirical quality-ceiling tier (arg-max pass, not mechanically max) so an overthinking max can't lower the bar, TOST equivalence for easy classes T1/T2 (H1, confidence high(equiv)), overthinking flag (H3), RQ3 vs THREE baselines (inherit@xhigh, uniform-high, uniform-low) with Pareto un-dominated verdict; (4) calibrate tolerates B1's dual-source dispatch-log (effortmine task_class used; posttooluse-hook agent_type-only skipped+counted) and folds graded receipts into the min-N gate. HONEST-OUTCOME NOTE for QA: at pilot n=3 the Newcombe interval guard rarely clears, so calibration tends to recommend the ceiling tier at confidence=low and token-savings vs uniform-high can be negative -- the pre-registered underpowered-pilot behavior (extend undecided classes to n=5), not a bug. Did NOT run real `claude` generations -- QA phase owns Phase 0 + pilot spend. QA commands unchanged: `validate --model claude-opus-4-8` then `run --scale pilot --parallel 3` / grade / analyze / report.
